system.description:
You are capable of eating even the most unappetizing, badly-contaminated, and semi-rotten foodstuffs without incurring harm, though you still can’t eat outright poison or other wholly inedible substances.

Level 1: Gain Survive as a bonus skill. You do not need to make a disease check when drinking unfiltered water and you need only one ration of food every two days. You gain a +2 bonus on all saves versus poison or diseases.

Level 2: Your System Strain maximum increases by +2, to a maximum of 20. By constant casual foraging of insects, grasses, bark, and other semi-edible substances you can feed yourself in any natural environment. You become immune to poisons short of military-grade engineered toxins.
